headline: UBS Sees Potential for 50% EPS Growth, Raises Delta Air Lines (DAL) Target
summary: Delta Air Lines, Inc. (NYSE:DAL) is included among the 10 Best Value Dividend Stocks to Buy Now According to Warren Buffett. On May 26, UBS raised its price recommendation on Delta Air Lines, Inc. (NYSE:DAL) to $98 from $95. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares. In a research note, the analyst said the […]
